choices.desc: Arcane Trickster: 1 spell up to 2nd level.

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.desc: Any ability check using a skill you're proficient in treats a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.desc: Arcane Trickster: Versatile Trickster. Assassin: Impostor. Thief: Use Magic Device. Swashbuckler: Elegant Maneuver.

features.name: Blindsense
features.desc: Within 10 ft, you know the location of any hidden or invisible creature.

features.desc: Proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

features.desc: Arcane Trickster: Spell Thief. Assassin: Death Strike. Thief: Thief's Reflexes. Swashbuckler: Master Duelist.

features.name: Elusive
features.desc: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.desc: Sneak Attack increases to 10d6.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.desc: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice.

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.desc: If an attack misses, turn it into a hit. Or treat a failed ability check as a 20. 1/Short Rest.
